top3.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE
  customer_dates AS (
    SELECT 
      customer_id,
      MIN(txn_date) AS start_date,
      MAX(txn_date) AS end_date
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id
  ),
  all_dates AS (
    SELECT 
      customer_id,
      start_date AS txn_date
    FROM customer_dates
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
      ad.customer_id,
      DATE(ad.txn_date, '+1 day') AS txn_date
    FROM all_dates ad
    JOIN customer_dates cd ON ad.customer_id = cd.customer_id
    WHERE ad.txn_date < c...

WITH RECURSIVE
customer_date_range AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MIN(txn_date) AS min_date,
        MAX(txn_date) AS max_date
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        cdr.customer_id,
        DATE(cdr.min_date) AS txn_date,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT SUM(ct.txn_amount) 
             FROM customer_transactions ct 
             WHERE ct.customer_id = cdr.customer_id 
               AND ct.txn_date <= DATE(cdr.min_...

WITH RECURSIVE
customer_date_range AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MIN(txn_date) AS min_date,
        MAX(txn_date) AS max_date
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
calendar_dates AS (
    SELECT min_date AS cal_date, customer_id
    FROM customer_date_range
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE(cal_date, '+1 day'), customer_id
    FROM calendar_dates
    WHERE cal_date < (SELECT max_date FROM customer_date_range c2 WHERE c2.customer_id = calendar_dates.customer_id)
)...
